industry_cn: UBNT/UniFi 企业 Wi-Fi 工程
title: UBNT WiFi 工程

vendor_focus.rationale: User explicitly chose UBNT/UniFi as the primary deployment platform; other enterprise SMB-Wi-Fi vendors serve as comparison points for trade-off decisions.

scenario_anchor.description: 80-person dense office, current Wi-Fi connection quality reported as poor
expected_diagnosis_dimensions: AP count vs floor area + user density
transmit power tuning (too high → co-channel interference)
band steering / min RSSI / fast roaming settings

warnings: locale=global but UBNT community is English-dominant (YouTube + Reddit + Ubiquiti Community forum); zh-CN secondary sources will be thinner.
Wi-Fi engineering canon (CWNA Sybex, 802.11 standards books) is English; user must accept English source preponderance.
